title: Elder qualifications; rebuke false teachers
summary_text: Paul servant apostle for faith elect—truth godliness; hope eternal life promised before ages. Appoint elders blameless husband one wife; hold fast faithful word; rebuke vain talkers especially circumcision—whole houses subverted.
key_points: Paul, a servant of God, and an apostle of Jesus Christ.
for the faith of God’s chosen ones, and the knowledge of the truth.
appoint elders in every city, as I directed you.
holding firm to the faithful word.
there are also vain talkers, especially those of the circumcision.
evidence_phrases: a servant of God, and an apostle
holding firm to the faithful word
One of them, a prophet of their own, said

title: Sound teaching; grace training; redemption
summary_text: Sound doctrine—older men sober; older women teachers good; young women love children; young men sober-minded. Servants obedient; grace of God appeared training us deny ungodliness—zealous good works; redeemed purified peculiar people.
key_points: But speak the things which fit sound doctrine.
The grace of God has appeared, bringing salvation to all men.
training us that, denying ungodliness and worldly lusts, we should live soberly.
who gave himself for us, that he might redeem us from all iniquity.
evidence_phrases: speak the things which fit sound doctrine
The grace of God has appeared
a people for his own possession

title: Regeneration; good works; final greeting
summary_text: Remind subject rulers; speak evil no man; gentleness all men—we foolish disobedient—kindness love Savior saved us washing regeneration renewing Spirit; heirs hope eternal. Maintain good works; avoid foolish questions; greet love faith grace.
key_points: Remind them to be in subjection to rulers and authorities.
according to his mercy, he saved us, through the washing of regeneration.
being justified by his grace, we might be made heirs.
that they would be careful to maintain good works.
Grace be with you all. Amen.
evidence_phrases: washing of regeneration and renewing by the Holy Spirit
heirs according to the hope of eternal life
